name: General
description: Starter deck. Topics describe kinds of people — broad to weirdly specific. Specific topics create the best arguments.

topics.text: A bald person
A person who has their own TV show
A millionaire
A chef
An assassin
A person who has a disciple
A person who was involved in a war
A person who experienced a near-death situation
A person who wears glasses
A villain
A parent
Royalty, or someone who acts like it
An athlete
A person with a famous catchphrase
A person who can fly (by any means)
A person who came back from the dead
A teacher or mentor
A person who owns a sword
A person who has been betrayed
A person banned from somewhere
A musician or singer
A person who talks to animals
A leader of an organization
A person who has cried on screen
A person younger than 18
A person with a scar
A doctor or healer
A person who has lost a fight
A person who cannot be trusted with money
A person who would survive a zombie apocalypse
